\tzpentry{ID3376}{Classical Quantum Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3376 introduces Classical Quantum Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align*} H_{\text{classical}} &= \int_V A\cdot B\,\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\ H_{\text{rotating}} &= -\frac{\omega_{\text{gyro}}}{c^2} \int_V r$\times$(E$\times$ B)\,\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\ H_{\text{quantum}} &= \sum_n n\,\mathrm{Prob}(n_{\text{flux}}=n)\,\frac{\hbar}{2e},\\ H_{\text{photon}} &= \int \hbar \omega_k\,(n_{L,k} - n_{R,k})\,\mathrm{d}^3k. \end{align*}
